task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule view is visible, indicating the agent bypassed the login screen using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the original appointment for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule view for July 15, 2025, is visible showing Maria Santos at 10:00 AM, or a patient search/history screen shows the original appointment.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the appointment edit or reschedule dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment details, edit, or reschedule window/popup is open specifically for Maria Santos.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the new date and time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the appointment edit/reschedule form, the date field is set to July 17, 2025 (2025-07-17) and the time is set to 14:00 (or 2:00 PM).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the appointment reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the appointment edit form, the reason or notes field contains the text 'Blood Pressure Check'.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointment was successfully saved on the new date and time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule view for Thursday, July 17, 2025, is visible and shows an appointment for Maria Santos at 14:00 (2:00 PM) with Dr. Sarah Chen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interface (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the OSCAR EMR web application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to update the appointment.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing 'mysql' commands or SQL 'UPDATE' statements modifying the appointment data directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Elements tab, Console) should not be open and used to manually alter the HTML text of the schedule.
